query_title: The Many Adventures of Winnie the Pooh

recommendations.title: Pooh's Grand Adventure: The Search for Christopher Robin
recommendations.overview: Pooh gets confused when Christopher Robin leaves him a note to say that he has gone back to school after the holidays. So Pooh, Piglet, Tigger, Eeyore and Rabbit go in search of Christopher Robin which leads to a big adventure.

recommendations.title: Winnie the Pooh and the Blustery Day
recommendations.overview: Winnie the Pooh and his friends experience high winds, heavy rains, and a flood in Hundred Acre Wood.

recommendations.title: Winnie the Pooh
recommendations.overview: During an ordinary day in Hundred Acre Wood, Winnie the Pooh sets out to find some honey. Misinterpreting a note from Christopher Robin, Owl convinces Pooh, Tigger, Rabbit, Piglet, Kanga, Roo, and Eeyore that their young friend has been captured by a

recommendations.title: Christopher Robin
recommendations.overview: Christopher Robin, the boy who had countless adventures in the Hundred Acre Wood, has grown up and lost his way. Now it’s up to his spirited and loveable stuffed animals, Winnie The Pooh, Tigger, Piglet, and the rest of the gang, to rekindle their fr

recommendations.title: Robin Hood
recommendations.overview: With King Richard off to the Crusades, Prince John and his slithering minion, Sir Hiss, set about taxing Nottingham's citizens with support from the corrupt sheriff - and staunch opposition by the wily Robin Hood and his band of merry men.

recommendations.title: The Rescuers
recommendations.overview: Two agents of the mouse-run International Rescue Aid Society search for a little orphan girl kidnapped by sinister treasure hunters.
recommendations.director: Art Stevens, John Lounsbery, Wolfgang Reitherman

recommendations.title: The Jungle Book
recommendations.overview: The boy Mowgli makes his way to the man-village with Bagheera, the wise panther. Along the way he meets jazzy King Louie, the hypnotic snake Kaa and the lovable, happy-go-lucky bear Baloo, who teaches Mowgli "The Bare Necessities" of life and the tru

recommendations.title: Piglet's Big Movie
recommendations.overview: When the gang from the Hundred Acre Wood begin a honey harvest, young Piglet is excluded and told that he is too small to help. Feeling inferior, Piglet disappears and his pals Eeyore, Rabbit, Tigger, Roo and Winnie the Pooh must use Piglet's scrapbo

recommendations.title: The Sword in the Stone
recommendations.overview: Wart is a young boy who aspires to be a knight's squire. On a hunting trip he falls in on Merlin, a powerful but amnesiac wizard who has plans for him beyond mere squiredom. He starts by trying to give him an education, believing that once one has an

recommendations.title: Winnie-the-Pooh: Blood and Honey 2
recommendations.overview: Five months following the murders, Christopher Robin struggles to maintain a regular life while dealing with PTSD. However, deep within the 100-Acre-Wood, a destructive rage grows as Pooh, Piglet, Owl, and Tigger find their home and their lives endan
